module.name: phyto_phytosanitary
module.description: Attaches phytosanitary inspection certificates, import permits, and other regulatory documents to products, with uploaded PDFs available for customers to download on the product page under a "Regulatory Documents" tab. Reference numbers from attached documents are automatically printed on packing slip PDFs, providing a complete compliance paper trail. Essential for sellers of regulated plant material, especially imported species subject to CITES or national phytosanitary requirements.
module.author: PhytoCommerce
